hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys, json, re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=' '.join(d.get('tool_parameters', {}).get('command', '').split()); patterns=[r'push\s+.*--force(?!-with-lease)', r'push\s+.*-f(?!\w)', r'reset\s+.*--hard', r'checkout\s+\.', r'restore\s+\.', r'clean\s+.*-f', r'branch\s+.*-D']; blocked=[p for p in patterns if re.search(p, cmd)]; [sys.exit('BLOCKED: ' + cmd) for _ in blocked if blocked]" 2>&1
